fields.name: name
fields.description: Cluster name in the format ACT-CL JHHMM.m±DDMM

fields.name: RADeg
fields.description: Right Ascension in decimal degrees (J2000) of the SZ detection by ACT

fields.name: decDeg
fields.description: Declination in decimal degrees (J2000) of the SZ detection by ACT

fields.name: SNR
fields.description: Signal-to-noise ratio, optimized over all filter scales

fields.name: y_c
fields.description: Central Comptonization parameter measured using the optimal matched filter template (the one that maximizes SNR); uncertainty in err_y_c

fields.name: fixed_SNR
fields.description: Signal-to-noise ratio at the reference 2.4 arcmin filter scale; the quantity used for estimating completeness

fields.name: fixed_y_c
fields.description: Central Comptonization parameter at the reference 2.4 arcmin filter scale; the SZ signal used for inferring mass estimates

fields.name: template
fields.description: Name of the matched filter template resulting in the highest SNR detection of this cluster

fields.name: tileName
fields.description: Name of the ACT map tile in which the cluster was found

fields.name: flags
fields.description: Quality flags; use flags = 0 to select 'clean' regions

fields.name: redshift
fields.description: Adopted redshift for the cluster; uncertainty (redshiftErr) given only for photometric redshifts

fields.name: redshiftType
fields.description: Redshift type (spec = spectroscopic, phot = photometric)

fields.name: redshiftSource
fields.description: Source of the adopted redshift

fields.name: M500c
fields.description: M500c assuming a scaling relation normalization 1e-4 A0 = 3.0e-5, consistent with recent weak-lensing measurements (Robertson et al. 2024, Shirasaki et al. 2024)

fields.name: M200c
fields.description: M200 with respect to the critical density

fields.name: M200m
fields.description: M200 with respect to the mean density

fields.name: A10_M500c
fields.description: M500c assuming the Arnaud et al. (2010) scaling relation (the default assumption in previous ACT data releases); the mass estimate to use for comparison with the Planck PSZ2 catalog

fields.name: theta500Arcmin
fields.description: Angular scale theta500c

fields.name: footprint_DES
fields.description: Flag indicating if the cluster falls within the DES footprint

fields.name: footprint_HSC
fields.description: Flag indicating if the cluster falls within the HSC footprint

fields.name: footprint_KIDS
fields.description: Flag indicating if the cluster falls within the KiDS footprint

fields.name: footprint_Legacy
fields.description: Flag indicating membership of the Legacy cosmology-subsample footprint (Legacy cut: fixed_SNR > 5.5, flags == 0, footprint_Legacy == True)

fields.name: RM
fields.description: Flag indicating cross-match with a redMaPPer-detected cluster in the SDSS footprint

fields.name: CAMIRA
fields.description: Flag indicating cross-match with a CAMIRA-detected cluster (HSC-SSP S23B)

fields.name: eRASS1CL
fields.description: Flag indicating cross-match with an eRASS1 cluster (Bulbul et al. 2024)

fields.name: opt_RADeg
fields.description: Alternative optically-determined RA (J2000), from a heterogeneous collection of measurements (see opt_positionSource); 0 for many objects

fields.name: opt_decDeg
fields.description: Alternative optically-determined Dec (J2000)

fields.name: opt_positionSource
fields.description: Source of the alternative optical position

fields.name: notes
fields.description: If present, at least one of: AGN?; Lensing?; Merger?; Star formation? (not comprehensive; from visual inspection)

fields.name: warnings
fields.description: If present, a warning message related to the redshift measurement for this cluster
